intro: AI is charging into 2026 on all fronts — from energy-efficient neuro-symbolic models and 10-trillion parameter releases to landmark healthcare automation and a $250B acquisition that reshuffled the industry.

top_stories.headline: Energy Breakthrough: Neuro-Symbolic AI Cuts Compute Cost by 100×
top_stories.summary: Researchers have unveiled a neuro-symbolic AI approach that slashes energy use by up to 100× while improving accuracy. The method mirrors human step-by-step reasoning by combining neural networks with symbolic logic — a potential turning point for sustainable AI at scale.

top_stories.headline: SpaceX Acquires xAI in $250B Mega-Deal
top_stories.summary: In one of the largest AI acquisitions ever recorded, SpaceX has acquired Elon Musk's xAI for $250 billion. The deal signals a major consolidation in frontier AI and raises questions about the future direction of the Grok model family.

top_stories.headline: Utah Becomes First State to Let AI Renew Drug Prescriptions
top_stories.summary: Utah has passed legislation granting AI systems the authority to autonomously renew drug prescriptions, marking a historic milestone in healthcare AI. The move is being closely watched by regulators and medical groups across the country.

top_stories.headline: Enterprise AI Agents Cross $600B in Investment as Adoption Surges
top_stories.summary: Gartner projects 40% of enterprise applications will embed task-specific AI agents by end of 2026. Investment in AI agent ecosystems has surpassed $600 billion, with nearly 90% of organizations now using agents in software development workflows.

top_stories.headline: Anthropic's MCP Crosses 97 Million Installs — Now Foundational Infrastructure
top_stories.summary: The Model Context Protocol hit 97 million installs in March 2026, transitioning from an experimental standard into the de-facto foundation for building AI agents. Widespread adoption is accelerating integrations across developer tooling, enterprise apps, and cloud platforms.

quick_hits.text: Google drops Veo 3.1 Fast pricing, making AI video generation more affordable for developers.
Meta's MTIA 400 chip is in testing, with the 450 and 500 variants slated for mass deployment by 2027 to reduce reliance on Nvidia.
OpenAI's GPT-5.4 'Thinking' scores 83% on GDPVal — at or above human-expert level on economically valuable tasks.
Colorado AI Act takes effect June 30, 2026; EU AI Act transparency requirements kick in August 2 — compliance deadlines are approaching fast.
Apple CarPlay now supports voice-based ChatGPT interaction via the latest iOS and ChatGPT app updates.

closing_insight: 2026 is the year AI stops being experimental and starts being infrastructural — the real race now is not who builds the smartest model, but who ships the most reliable, compliant, and energy-efficient agent ecosystem at scale.
